name: EZPAWN
description_short: At 6342 Telephone Rd in Houston, TX, EZPAWN provides fast pawn loans and collateral-based financing for Southside residents.
description_long:
EZPAWN at 6342 Telephone Rd sits on the south side of Houston, TX, in a standalone location convenient to Southside neighborhoods. This Houston branch is open Monday through Friday 9AM-7PM, Saturday 9AM-6PM, and closed Sundays, making it easy to visit during a lunch break or weekend afternoon.

This location offers in-person pawn loans, collateral-based financing, and quick cash advances on gold, electronics, jewelry, and tools. Call (713) 645-1678 to discuss your specific items or ask about current rates before heading in.

If you're a Houston resident facing an unexpected cash need, bring a valid government ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell. EZPAWN specializes in fast, hassle-free transactions on valuables.
pros: EZ+ Rewards Program allows online management of pawns, layaways, and reward points from any device
Instant Quote tool provides estimated electronics loan values online before visiting the store
Retail merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail with daily new arrivals
Accepts firearms for loans and outright purchase — a service not available at all pawn locations
Gold and diamond buying includes in-store testing for accurate pricing, including broken gold of any karat
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payment schedule
Take Today flexible payment financing available via third-party partners, up to 12+ months
cons: Pawn loan fees and APR are not disclosed on the website — terms only available in-store
Loan amounts are entirely at the store's discretion based on item appraisal, with no published rate sheet
Redeemed pawned firearms require a background check, adding friction to item recovery
No credit-building component — pawn loans do not report to credit bureaus
Online payment functionality not available in Arizona, Oregon, or Pennsylvania (relevant for multi-state customers)
best_for: Consumers who need same-day cash without a credit check and own electronics, jewelry, or tools with resale value
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned electronics, gaming gear, or jewelry at steep discounts
Firearm owners looking to access liquidity against rifles, shotguns, or handguns without selling outright
Shoppers who want to lock in a price on merchandise without paying upfront via layaway
diagnosis: EZPAWN is best suited for consumers who need fast cash against personal assets — particularly electronics, jewelry, or firearms — and cannot or choose not to use traditional credit channels. The main caveat is full fee opacity: APR and loan terms are not published online, so customers must visit the store to understand the true cost of borrowing.
services: Collateral-based pawn loans on electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, firearms, and more
Gold and diamond jewelry buying (including broken gold, any karat)
Firearms loans and outright purchase at select locations
Pre-owned retail merchandise at 25–70% off new retail prices
Online shop with daily new arrivals
Instant Quote tool for electronics loan estimates
EZ+ Rewards Program with online pawn and layaway management
Take Today third-party flexible financing (up to 12+ months)
Product Protection Plans for electronics and audio/video equipment
Jewelry VIP Program with guaranteed loan amounts and free stone replacement
Auto loans (listed as a special service at this location)
meta_description: EZPAWN at 6342 Telephone Rd, Houston, TX. Fast pawn loans and cash advances on valuables with extended Saturday hours.
